'''Medrit Vasur''' was a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was a [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] and a [[Metalsmith/Legends|blacksmith]].<ref name="Sacrifice" /> His [[Marriage/Legends|husband]], the Mandalorian [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Goran Beviin]],<ref name="CSWE: Vasur">{{CSWECite|III|297|Vasur, Medrit}}</ref> was often away for long stretches while Medrit remained on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]. Their long, happy marriage spanned from well before [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] until after [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. Early in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], they also adopted [[Dinua Jeban]], a fourteen-year-old Mandalorian war orphan.

After [[Sintas Vel]] was awakened from carbon freeze, he let [[Hayca Mekket]] know she might be needed when [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] let loose his lack of confidence in [[Beluine]]'s ability. When [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] came to train under Fett, Vasur forged the Mandalore a set of his own [[Beskar/Legends|beskar]] upper body armor, though Goran had wanted a set of greaves made as well. He would later be told of the true identity of [[Bardan Jusik|Gotab]] by Solo but believed the matter closed after learning he had willingly chosen to be a Mando'ad instead of a Jedi.

==Behind the scenes==
First mentioned with the name Medrit in the [[2006]] [[EBook|e-novella]] ''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'' by [[Karen Traviss]],<ref name="Boba Fett: A Practical Man">''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]''</ref> the character first appeared in Traviss' [[2007]] novel ''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''. Although the Dramatis Personae at the beginning of ''Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice'' identifies him as Medrit Beviin, the actual text of the novel refers to him as Medrit Vasur,<ref name="Sacrifice" /> as does Traviss' novel ''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'',<ref name="Revelation">''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''</ref> which was published on [[February 26]], [[2008]].<ref name="Date">{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/novel/f20080226/index.html|text=''Revelation'' Excerpt}}</ref> On [[December 9]] of that year,<ref name="CSWE Date">[http://www.randomhouse.com/catalog/display.pperl?isbn=9780345477637 Random House] entry</ref> ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' contained an entry for him under "Vasur, Medrit,"<ref name="CSWE: Vasur" /> while the [[2012]] reference book ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' calls him Medrit Beviin.<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>

Medrit's gender has been specified in [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] as male, making Goran and Medrit the first explicitly gay couple in ''Star Wars'' literature.
